name: Policy Area Taxonomy
description: Enumerated taxonomy of policy areas used for classification and routing in the Administration policy vault.

areas.name: Core Governance
areas.description: Foundational decision-making, authority delegation, and organizational governance policies.

areas.name: HR & Performance
areas.description: Human resources, employee wellbeing, performance evaluation, and talent management policies.

areas.name: Operations Controls
areas.description: Attendance, calendar management, workflow controls, and operational procedure policies.

areas.name: Security & Compliance
areas.description: Data security, external integration security, access controls, and regulatory compliance policies.
